name: Date & Nut Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the margarine, sugar, pitted dates, cherry pieces, and beaten egg.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then continue boiling for 3-5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the rice crispies and walnuts, mixing well.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the coconut and roll to coat completely.
6. Refrigerate until set.
